axenic_LD.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD (axenic L:D periodic)
axenic_LD.functional_description: Enriched for photosystem I and II components, including genes psbA, psaA, and psaB.
axenic_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity only in axenic culture under diel light:dark (L:D) conditions, losing periodicity under extended darkness and in coculture.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.

axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (periodic in axenic L:D and darkness)
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.assessment_notes: No specific discussion found for this cluster.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD (periodic in both L:D cultures)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.functional_description: Enriched for photosystem subunits such as psbA, psbB, psaA, and psaB, and genes involved in Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, and glycogen metabolism.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultured Prochlorococcus under diel L:D conditions but lose periodicity under extended darkness.

supporting_quotes.quote: Many of the increases in transcript abundance for photosystem subunits (e.g., psbA, psbB, psaA, and psaB) seen in the axenic cultures did not occur in the cocultures, suggesting that the latter may have had additional energy sources.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness (periodic in axenic and coculture L:D and axenic darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific discussion found for this cluster.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (periodic across all conditions)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.functional_description: Includes transcripts associated with Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis, indicating maintenance of metabolic functionality across all conditions.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.temporal_pattern: Genes maintain 24-h periodicity across axenic and cocultured L:D and extended darkness conditions.

supporting_quotes.quote: Within these general trends in periodic behavior, we found that subsets of the Prochlorococcus transcriptome exhibited periodic oscillations under different combinations of culture conditions... including those that oscillated under all conditions.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic in L:D and coculture darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.functional_description: Enriched in transcripts encoding organic compound degradation and salvage pathways, such as amino acid degradation, indicating mixotrophic metabolism in coculture.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultured L:D conditions and in coculture extended darkness but not in axenic darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.expression_dynamics: periodic in L:D and coculture darkness

supporting_quotes.quote: Cocultured, but not axenic, Prochlorococcus cells were enriched in transcripts encoding organic compound degradation/salvage pathways, such as those for amino acids.

axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic in axenic L:D and coculture darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific discussion found for this cluster.

coculture_LD.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_LD (coculture L:D periodic)
coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity only in coculture under diel L:D conditions, losing periodicity under extended darkness and in axenic cultures.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts retained their periodicity in cocultures versus axenic cultures, both under extended darkness and even during the normal diel L:D cycle.

coculture_LD.assessment_notes: No specific functional enrichment reported for this cluster.

coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_LD+axenic_darkness (periodic in coculture L:D and axenic darkness)
coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific discussion found for this cluster.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic in coculture L:D and darkness)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific discussion found for this cluster.

coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_darkness (coculture darkness periodic)
coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific discussion found for this cluster.

not_periodic.name: NATL2A cluster not_periodic (not periodic)
not_periodic.temporal_pattern: Genes that do not exhibit significant 24-h periodicity under any of the tested conditions.

supporting_quotes.quote: Other transcripts did not exhibit periodicity under any conditions (see Fig. 4B to F for representative examples).
